CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-26-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-26-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jan-10-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Court Trial hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge
Michael Hoffman, Esq. for Plaintiff: David Gunderman, the Service Manager
Defendant: Robert Hill, in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The parties enter into a stipulation for entry of judgment.
Mr. Hill to dismiss his cross-complaint
Mr. Hoffman, to file a dismissal as to Julia, a Cal. Corp.
Defendant to pay $15,000.00 by 31/Dec/05, if no payment the full amount of $30,000.00 is due and plaintiff to obtain a judgment by ex parte with 24 hours notice to defendant.
Continued to the 225 hearing on January 10, 2006 at 10:00 AM in Dept. 212.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-10-2004 Continued To Jul-26-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
